games.headline: Miami 7, Washington 3 — King (W)
games.summary: John King pitched 1.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs, leading Miami past Washington 7-3 at Nationals Park. Miles Mikolas lasted 6.0 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 4 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Miami: H.Hernández homered with 3 RBI; O.Lopez homered; J.Mack homered with 3 RBI.

games.headline: Detroit Blank Tampa Bay, 8-0
games.summary: Jack Flaherty pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading Detroit past Tampa Bay 8-0 at Tropicana Field. Steven Matz lasted 1.2 innings, giving up 5 earned runs, 2 strikeouts. Offensively for Detroit: G.Torres homered; R.Greene homered; W.Pérez homered with 2 RBI. Enmanuel De Jesus closed it out for the save. Tampa Bay was held scoreless.

games.headline: Texas 7, St. Louis 4 — Quantrill (W)

Riley O'Brien lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 3 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Texas: J.Pederson went 3-for-4, including 2 doubles with 2 RBI; K.Higashioka went 3-for-4, including 1 double. N.Gorman went deep for St. Louis. Jakob Junis closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Cleveland 9, New York 4 — Holderman (W)
